title: Dromii
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dromii''' was a pair of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Modular conveyor]]s. The Modular Conveyors were part of convoy [[Rope 17]], which was supposed to upgrade the [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[ZA-13]]. Dromii carried equipment for the factory. Despite being attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiders, the duo managed to deliver their cargo and escape into hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
